message:
feat(io,ufunc,conformance): add bytemuck zero-copy IO, propagate integer sidecars through sort/set/broadcast ops, and optimize hot paths

fnp-io:
- Add bytemuck dependency for zero-copy f64 serialization on native-endian platforms
- Fast-path tofile/fromfile/save/load when dtype is native-endian f64 (cast_slice
  instead of per-element encoding/decoding)
- Add write_native_endian_f64_npy_bytes and fromfile_native_endian_f64 helpers with
  misaligned-payload fallback via chunks_exact
- Fix fromstring text-mode to reject internal empty fields while still allowing a
  trailing separator

fnp-ufunc:
- Convert synthesized_integer_sidecar and exact_integer_sidecar from Option to
  Result return types, propagating UFuncError instead of silently dropping sidecars
  when values are unrepresentable
- Propagate integer sidecars through sort, argsort, partition, argpartition,
  searchsorted, lexsort, unique_with_info, in1d, union1d, intersect1d, setdiff1d,
  setxor1d, choose, broadcast_arrays, broadcast_to, trim_zeros, tile, unstack,
  meshgrid, unique_along_axis, take, byteswap, newbyteorder, pad, fill, boolean_set,
  fancy_set, and put_mask via reindexed_integer_sidecar
- Change pad and insert from silently dropping sidecars to returning errors for
  unrepresentable constants (fractional i64, negative u64)
- Change MaskedArray::filled from infallible to Result, propagating integer bridge
  validation errors through prod, min, max, cumsum, cumprod, and dot
- Optimize binary broadcast: specialize when one operand matches output shape and
  the other broadcasts contiguously (tail_contiguous_broadcast_span), with an
  extra Add fast-path using copy_from_slice + in-place mutation
- Extract matmul_accumulate helper; skip batch odometer setup for non-batched matmul
- Optimize reduce_sum_axis for inner==1 (contiguous lane) using chunks_exact + sum
- Optimize sort: add counting-sort fast path for exact-i64 data, partition NaNs to
  tail before unstable sort, skip nan_last_cmp when no NaNs present
- Add sort_indices_by_kind_ord generic helper for Ord-based index sorting
- Optimize FFT: replace element-by-element loop with copy_from_slice + chunks_exact_mut

fnp-conformance:
- Propagate filled() Result via map_err in execute_masked_differential_operation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -150,6 +150,12 @@ version = "3.20.2"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "5d20789868f4b01b2f2caec9f5c4e0213b41e3e5702a50157d699ae31ced2fcb"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "bytemuck"
+version = "1.25.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "c8efb64bd706a16a1bdde310ae86b351e4d21550d98d056f22f8a7f7a2183fec"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "cast"
 version = "0.3.0"
@@ -414,6 +420,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "fnp-io"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "bytemuck",
  "flate2",
 ]
